primary_text:
The Australian grocery market is worth $130B. Direct-to-farm food is growing 24% year-on-year.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store with 50+ regenerative farms, 2,000+ customers, and a hub-and-collect model that cuts out unnecessary middlemen.

In July 2026, we're opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal. From $50, capped at $10K.

If you care about where your food comes from, now you can help build what comes next.

Not financial advice.
headline: $130B market. We're just getting started
description: Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026. From $50, capped at $10K.
creative_brief: Market size stat in large type on warm background. Below: FarmThru traction stats. Clean, investor-friendly but approachable. Not corporate.
